Core value

Human connection over algorithmic engagement.

Vybe asks a better question than most platforms: what do you actually want to share?

Navigate

Vybe live demo

Not just a proposal anymore. This is how Vybe feels.

This interactive website turns your proposal into a working product demo: a calmer social network for students, creatives, professionals, travelers, and families to share moments that matter.

Focus Low-noise feed

Moments first. Performance pressure second.

Experience Warm, premium, social

Rose-led branding with clean, modern interactions.

Audience Everyone with a story

No niche restriction. Human connection is the product.

Feed filters

Signals, not noise

Discover

Find people and communities that match your energy

Organic-first growth starts in small circles. This view shows how Vybe can help people discover communities without turning the whole experience into noisy recommendation chaos.

Start with communities

Suggested connections

Memories

Moments that deserve to live longer than a trending cycle

This space translates your proposal’s idea of genuine sharing into memory boards: student wins, family milestones, travel journals, and creative progress all in one calm archive.

KP

Profile

Kathy Pepito

Student founder, concept lead, and builder of a warmer social space.

Designing a platform where people can post wins, photos, thoughts, and memories without feeling like they are competing with an algorithm.

Voice lead with clarity
Bond build small circles first
Energy make moments feel alive

Good fits for your circle

Technical direction

Build path from the proposal

  • Frontend: HTML5, Bootstrap 5, JavaScript, responsive UI
  • Backend: PHP MVC structure for routes and controllers
  • Database: MySQL with PDO prepared statements
  • Security: sessions, password hashing, XSS and SQL protection
  • Core features: posts, comments, likes, profiles, search
